title: Table 3 - Evaluation Criteria Matrix: Tender Value ($250,000+)

content.local_preference_note: When evaluating submissions any supplier identified as local to the Blacktown LGA or the wider Western Sydney area will attract a percentage price discount as dictated by their physical location. The evaluation spread sheet located on the procurement – tenders section of the intranet must be used.

standard_product_good.name: Standard product or good
standard_product_good.description: Refers to a product or good that is well tested in the market place and is utilised by many other organisations.
standard_product_good.risk_profile: Medium Risk - Risk level can increase as price increases

construction_contract.name: Construction contract valued at over $249,999
construction_contract.description: Typically a contract requiring a limited level of professional input combined with construction works
construction_contract.risk_profile: Medium – High Risk - Essential to ensure time lines and budget met. Works comply with specifications

consultancy_contract.name: Consultancy contract valued at over $249,999
consultancy_contract.description: Consultancy requiring a high level of technical expertise often from a range of professionals. May also include a high level of innovation
consultancy_contract.risk_profile: Medium to High Risk - Essential to ensure project team satisfy the specification

service_delivery_contract.name: Service delivery contract valued at over $249,999
service_delivery_contract.description: Service delivery contract involving the provision of a service that often covers more than one year and/or multiple service components
service_delivery_contract.risk_profile: Medium to High Risk - Essential to ensure service delivered on time and on a long term basis

management_contract.name: Management Contract valued at over $249,999
management_contract.description: Refers to a contract where the contractor manages a facility for council (i.e. Café, showground)
management_contract.risk_profile: Medium to High Risk - Dependent on staff appointed to deliver the contract and period of contract

lease_license.name: Lease / License valued at over $249,999
lease_license.description: Where a supplier is submitting a price to access a Council service or resource (i.e. commercial activity)
lease_license.risk_profile: Medium to High Risk - Highly dependent on experience and track record of proposed service provider

metadata.source: Blacktown City Council Tender & Quotation Evaluation Manual
metadata.section: For purchases $250,000 and over (inclusive of GST)
